name: insane-review
description: Use GPT-5.5 Pro (web-only, no API) from inside gjc: gjc picks the complete relevant file set, repomix-packs it (full code, line numbers, secretlint), drives your logged-in ChatGPT web session over CDP, verifies the model fail-closed, and harvests the review to .insane-review/. Zero API cost. Also works as a web-only agent-council member.
